title: Smoky Sweet Norwegian Potato Skillet
description: A hearty and flavorful Norwegian dish featuring sweet smoked paprika, perfect for a crowd, made in a cast-iron skillet. This funky and crumbly skillet is a crowd-pleaser.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large cast-iron skillet, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the sliced potatoes, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and stir in the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter until it is melted and the potatoes are coated.
Sprinkle the chopped parsley over the top of the potatoes and serve hot.
